title: Integrate prompt feedback kernel and Leeseo wishlist into Handshake workflows
operator_request: Include the assistant prompt feedback kernel handoff and Leeseo wishlist as a future Handshake workflow connected to Atelier/Comfy/intake.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Read both external handoff/wishlist files before implementation. Preserve their requirements explicitly; do not reduce them to generic prompt notes.

scope.summary: Turn the Leeseo prompt feedback handoff into native Handshake prompt/render review workflow connected to Atelier, ComfyUI receipts, and CKC/Ingest outputs.
base_scope: Inspect and preserve requirements from the prompt feedback kernel handoff and Leeseo wishlist.
Define import paths for prompt/render receipts and review verdicts.
Implement or stage rule-pack rewrite workflows and traceable exports.
Connect feedback records to CKC characters, ComfyUI renders, and Ingest review artifacts where relevant.
Expose model-facing headless commands and operator-visible review surfaces.
Update internal UserManual with prompt feedback workflow.
acceptance_criteria: External prompt feedback handoff and wishlist requirements are mapped to native Handshake workflow fields.
Prompt/render receipts can be imported or referenced.
Review verdicts and rewrite suggestions are persisted and traceable.
Argus can inspect and steer the prompt feedback surface.
verification: Requirement-map review against the external files.
Native UI/Argus evidence for review workflow.
